nasb.text: Why do you look with envy, O mountains with many peaks, At the mountain which God has desired for His abode? Surely the Lord will dwell there forever.

esv.text: Why do you look with hatred, O many-peaked mountain, at the mount that God desired for his abode, yes, where the Lord will dwell forever?

cnv.text: 多峰多嶺的山哪！ 你們為甚麼敵視　神所喜悅居住的山呢？ 耶和華必住在那裡，直到永遠。

ccb.text: 崇山峻岭啊， 你们为何嫉妒地盯着上帝选为居所的山， 耶和华永远居住的地方呢？

csbs.text: 多峰的群山哪， 你们为什么嫉妒神喜爱居住的山呢？ 要知道，耶和华将在那里永久居住。
